title: Spicy Basil Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful stir fry made with fresh basil and spicy mexican chilies. Serve as a side dish or add to your favorite noodles.
instructions: Heat the infused oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced chilies and cook for 2-3 minutes until fragrant.
Add the diced onion and cook for 3-4 minutes until softened.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the chopped basil and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes until wilted.
Add the stir fry sauce and cook for 1 minute until combined.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
